claim_bullets.bullet_text: Sage skill represents comprehensive knowledge in all academic fields, unknown if it applies to all disciplines. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.118-119)

source_record_text: The sage skill represents a comprehensive understanding and depth of knowledge in all academic fields. Academic fields in _Sword World_ are undifferentiated, and owners of this skill are skilled in all disciplines. Many sorcerers have this skill. There is no requirement that you have to have the sage skill and the sorcerer skill at the same time, but if you _do_ acquire the sage skill and the sorcerer skill at the same time, you will receive a _bonus_ on experience points consumed. For more information, please refer to Chapter 8: Character Growth (see p. 129).
